title: NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK - 211info
text: NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK LA GRANDE NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Medicaid programs, Qualified Health Plans, and financial assistance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace. Also offers help with reporting changes, submitting documents, and resolving complex issues. Provides referrals and navigation support to access health and social services as needed. 2008 Third Street Suite A La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm; appointment hours vary (541) 624-5101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 624-5101 Español (541) 910-0336 Teresa Aguilera [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information. Walk up window available; ring bell for service. FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Marshallese, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Union, and Wallowa Counties Services: General Health Insurance Information/Counseling Medicaid Information/Counseling Specialized Information and Referral If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK LA GRANDE
